'''zhadanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dluwang|dluwang]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dluwang|dluwang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhadanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædængæth|zhædængæth]] || [[word:zhædængæj|zhædængæj]] || [[word:zhædængæsh|zhædængæsh]] || [[word:zhædængæ|zhædængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadadangath|zhadadangath]] || [[word:zhadadangaj|zhadadangaj]] || [[word:zhadadangash|zhadadangash]] || [[word:zhadadanga|zhadadanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadangath|zhadangath]] || [[word:zhadangaj|zhadangaj]] || [[word:zhadangash|zhadangash]] || [[word:zhadanga|zhadanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadafngath|zhadafngath]] || [[word:zhadafngaj|zhadafngaj]] || [[word:zhadafngash|zhadafngash]] || [[word:zhadafngaf|zhadafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadangatha|zhadangatha]] || [[word:zhadangaja|zhadangaja]] || [[word:zhadangasha|zhadangasha]] || [[word:zhadangaka|zhadangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadangath|zhadangath]] || [[word:zhadangaj|zhadangaj]] || [[word:zhadangash|zhadangash]] || [[word:zhadanga|zhadanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadangathal|zhadangathal]] || [[word:zhadangajal|zhadangajal]] || [[word:zhadangashal|zhadangashal]] || [[word:zhadangakal|zhadangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadangathatha|zhadangathatha]] || [[word:zhadangajaja|zhadangajaja]] || [[word:zhadangashasha|zhadangashasha]] || [[word:zhadangaka|zhadangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadangathan|zhadangathan]] || [[word:zhadangajan|zhadangajan]] || [[word:zhadangashan|zhadangashan]] || [[word:zhadangakan|zhadangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadangathaoro|zhadangathaoro]] || [[word:zhadangajaoro|zhadangajaoro]] || [[word:zhadangashaoro|zhadangashaoro]] || [[word:zhadangakaoro|zhadangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
